import { Scheduler } from '../Scheduler'; export class AsyncScheduler extends Scheduler { constructor(SchedulerAction, now = Scheduler.now) { super(SchedulerAction, now); this.actions = []; this._active = false; } flush(action) { const { actions } = this; if (this._active) { actions.push(action); return; } let error; this._active = true; do { if ((error = action.execute(action.state, action.delay))) { break; } } while ((action = actions.shift())); this._active = false; if (error) { while ((action = actions.shift())) { action.unsubscribe(); } throw error; } } } //# sourceMappingURL=AsyncScheduler.js.map
